content_body: Thank you so much for opening up your cozy & beautiful home. What a spectacular and glorious view! We had such a wonderful time here relaxing with our son, daughter, son-in law, & 3 grand babies. We all wish we planned to stay longer and hope to return again next year! We left sone little gifts behind for you as a token of our appreciation for your kind hospitality. We found a Mercies Orchards to be such a charming and fun experience; and found a blue ridge mountain wood cutting board, a cute pine tree dishtowel, some wine glasses, wine opener, & water glasses. What a blessing and a joy to have made such wonderful memories here with our sweet family. May God richly bless you and your family! Tim and Pam Block & family.
title: What a spectacular and glorious view!
